text: Welcome to the Magic Kingdom, Silvana!

Welcome to the portrait gallery! Look at this girl. What is she like?
Wonderful! And this boy — what is he like?
Great! And you — what are you like?
Welcome, dreamer! If you work hard, what will you be?
Wonderful! And if you try your best, what will you win?
Amazing! How do you feel about your dream?
Wonderful! And what have you seen on the way?
Amazing! What will you explore next?
You have been to the sea!
You have been to the mountains!
You have been to the city!
Hi Mia, I'm happy to meet you.
Hello! I'm glad to meet you.
Hi Leo, nice to meet you!
In my opinion, films are fun.
I see your point, but I'm not sure.
Hello! Yes, I'd like a jacket.
I like it! What's the price?
Do you have a bigger size?
Can I pay with a card?
Excuse me, could you help me?
How do I get to the station?
Straight on, then left. Got it!
Oh no, why are you worried?
If I were you, I'd read your notes.
Why don't you take a break?
You don't have to, but thanks!
Yesterday I went to the beach!
Yes! My dog jumped in the water!
I fell over, but it was funny!
In the end, we were tired but happy.
Hi! I'm Mia. Nice to meet you!
Let me introduce you to my friend Leo!
Me too! Do you prefer films or books?
Interesting! What's your favourite kind of film?
Nice. I think science-fiction is the best. Do you agree?
Ha! That's a good point. Shall we watch one together?
Great! How about bringing a game to play?
Perfect. Why don't we make some pizza too?
Cool! Shall we invite Leo as well?
Awesome. How about starting at four o'clock?
Great! Shall we meet at the park?
Cool. What time shall we meet?
Four o'clock works for me. What shall we do?
Perfect plan! Shall I bring the ball?
Hello! Welcome to my shop. Can I help you?
Of course! How about this blue jacket?
It's twenty euros. Would you like to try it on?
It looks great on you! Do you want it?
Thank you! Here's your change and your bag.
Hi there! You look a bit lost. Can I help you?
Of course! Where do you want to go?
No problem. Go straight on, then turn left.
It's not far, just five minutes. You can't miss it!
I'm nervous because I haven't studied enough.
That's a good idea. But I'm also very tired.
You're right. Maybe I should relax a little.
Thank you. I feel much better now.
Thanks. Oh no, I think I broke your pencil. It's my fault.
You're so kind. Thank you for being patient.
Let me buy you a new pencil to say sorry.
Wow, sounds fun! And what happened next?
Cool! Then what did you do?
Ha ha! And how did it end?
What a great story! I love hearing about your day.
Wonderful! Tell me — what do you think about learning English?
I agree! Would you like to play a game with me?
Great! Shall we meet again on Saturday to play more?
Perfect. Oh, I dropped my book. Could you help me?
Thank you so much! You are very kind.
By the way — guess what! Yesterday I found a magic word. What did you do yesterday?
Now, would you like to come to the word party?
Someone is lost! How do we help them?
Turn left, then go straight on!
Turn right, it is not far!
